title: chrysanthemum anthemoides
intro: Chrysanthemum anthemoides, also known as Korean chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum anthemoides include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and improving respiratory function. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
